fields.name: accent
fields.label: Accent color (hex)
fields.description: Brand accent used for buttons/links. e.g. #2E8C86

fields.name: quiz
fields.label: Lead quiz (Let's Grow)
fields.description: The qualifying quiz behind the header button. Steps run in order; a step with a Branch set is only asked when that service is picked.

fields.name: visible
fields.label: Enabled (uncheck to send the button to the contact form instead)

fields.name: duration
fields.label: Time estimate (e.g. About 60 seconds)
fields.description: Set expectations before they start. Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: branch
fields.label: Only ask for
fields.description: Which service picks this question. 'any' asks it of everyone.

fields.name: picks
fields.label: Sets the service branch (first question only)
fields.description: On the service question, what this answer selects.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: The final button promises a plan — say when it lands, and make sure it does.

fields.name: theme
fields.label: Color theme
fields.description: Re-skins the whole page. Every section reads the theme tokens.

fields.name: bgVideoMobile
fields.label: Background video (mobile)
fields.description: Optional. Falls back to the desktop video.

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.description: Line breaks here show on the chip.

fields.name: images
fields.label: Images (2+ to fan out, overrides single)

fields.name: headlineLine1Accent
fields.label: Headline line 1 — gradient words (e.g. Plan)
fields.description: Leads the line in the sunset gradient. Leave empty for no accent.

fields.name: headlineLine2Accent
fields.label: Headline line 2 — gradient words (e.g. Go Live)
fields.description: Leads the line in the sunset gradient. Leave empty for no accent.

fields.name: images
fields.label: Images (2+ to fan out, overrides single)

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
